title: lastrea bipinnata
intro: Lastrea bipinnata, also known as the bipinnate fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The medicinal properties of Lastrea bipinnata include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of fever and cough, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Lastrea bipinnata include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Lastrea bipinnata can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
